purpose: Decomposing the gap between financial conditions and the policy rate to identify which channels are doing the easing work.
components: Total divergence: ~75-100bp easier than 4.25-4.50% policy rate
current_assessment: Called the most actionable insight by pair_3 debate. Reveals that equity and credit channels dominate Fed loosening, making conditions fragile to market reversals. Asymmetric cross-central-bank implication: ECB more FX-sensitive because European equity/credit provide less loosening.
limitations: Precise magnitude depends on FCI construction methodology
Channel decomposition may not be stable over time
Equity/credit channels are reflexive and could reverse rapidly
Cross-provider comparison of FCI methodologies not resolved
